# AIS FLOWS

AIS FLOWS is a compact public showcase for AI media production, workflows, skills, systems, and tools by Andrei Spirydovich.

## Home routes

- EN Home: `./index.html`
- RU Home: `./ru/index.html`
- EN request: `./request/index.html`
- RU request: `./ru/request/index.html`
- Canonical machine-readable model: `./content-model.json`
- Agent discovery: `./AI_AGENT_DISCOVERY.md`

## Products

- Proofline: released; GitHub release route is verified in `content-model.json`.
- Ready Gate: released; GitHub release and package artifact routes are verified in `content-model.json`.
- Skill Cleaner: released; GitHub release route is verified in `content-model.json`.
- Video Builder Pack: `preview_pending`; no public package, download, payment, or product page is active.
- Local AI Gateway: `in_development`; no public release, download, or app page is active.

## Media

- Featured trailer: YouTube video `DDpVQ53pnAI`, embedded on the Home Media section.

## Contact

- Request form is present as a local UI contract, but the external receiver is not configured or proven.
- Use the email fallback in the request route when contacting AIS FLOWS.

## Limits

This is the public Home V0 implementation on GitHub Pages. External analytics, receiver provisioning, payment, and custom-domain metadata are not claimed here.
